title: Duplicate the automation recipe
excerpt: It takes time and effort to make the right automation recipe, and many times the same automation recipe is repeated with slightly different changes such as changing the notification message or the person to be notified. …

posts.author: Altuijri (Ahmad)
posts.cookedHtml:
It takes time and effort to make the right automation recipe, and many times the same automation recipe is repeated with slightly different changes such as changing the notification message or the person to be notified. Since there is no duplication option, you have to repeat the same recipe many times, depends on your work flow.
I believe adding a new option to duplicate the recipe will make the automation work easier and safe time !

posts.author: anonuser73 (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: Completely agree. I’d love to see a duplication option, or better still an automation centre that includes saved recipes.

posts.author: essamsalama (essam salama)
posts.cookedHtml: This will save me tons of time.

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all!

Thanks for writing in with your feedback around being able to duplicate automation recipes that you’ve set up on a board. I can definitely hear where you’re coming from and I’ve gone ahead and passed this feedback to our Autopilot Team for their review and consideration!

I’d love to advocate for this on my behalf as this would be really powerful feature that could benefit many teams and organizations using our platform!

posts.author: mpm0rgan (Matthew Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: This could be implemented either by being able to duplicate any existing automation and/or being able to create “template” automations if certain automations are frequently the basis for new automations. Likewise, it would be useful to have the ability to be able to organize and sort existing automations (e.g. by date created, type of automation, etc). While this is an extension of this suggestion, I would suggest that all of these types of functionality would fall under the rubrik “Automation management”.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

We sincerely apologise for the delay in responding to this thread! We are working on improving our responsiveness to the community, particularly our feature request process so appreciate your patience in advance.

On that note, as you may have noticed, the duplication of custom automation recipes is now supported

Screen Shot 2022-12-07 at 9.15.51 am800×428 25 KB

Let us know if you have any additional comments!
